sessions.intent: Mine coder session 2026-06-19 for self-correction moments and turn them into MEMORY.md rules and doc proposals

before.assumptions: Coder MEMORY.md is sparse (2 entries). Self-corrections from today's session are unrecorded.
before.risk: peer-sessions filesystem is read-only — can propose changes but not apply them directly.

actions.context: Evidence ledger: 6 self-corrections SC1-SC6 with quotes and timestamps
Proposals for coder MEMORY.md and character file — cannot write directly (EROFS)
New doc/ tree mirroring OBP structure. start.md is the entry point per folder. [[path]] syntax for source inclusion.

after.health: 6 findings documented, proposals written, doc/ tree created with example. peer-sessions files are read-only — proposals need Ingi to apply.
after.notes: SC1-SC6 tracked in retro MEMORY.md to avoid re-proposing.

sessions.intent: Apply SC1-SC6 proposals directly to coder character/memory files and docs character memory

before.assumptions: Characters are now accessible at /workspace/plang/characters/ (not EROFS). proposals.md contains the ready-to-apply content.
before.risk: Edits are direct — git is the safety net for Ingi to review and revert if needed.

actions.context: Added SC1-SC6 bullets to Coder discipline section. Added SC5 Memory System callout near top.
Added 4 sub-sections to OBP section: verify subagent claims, LSP before adding, test-only methods, OBP usage-smell question.
Added SC5 Memory System callout — universally applicable lesson about the memory index.
Changelog of every edit applied, with F# backing.

after.health: SC1-SC6 fully applied. Coder memory and character updated. Docs memory updated with SC5.
after.notes: All changes are in the PLang repo on this branch — Ingi reviews via git diff before merging.

sessions.intent: Mine two earlier coder sessions from 2026-06-18 (93456b3b, efe53299) for new teachable moments not already in SC1-SC8

before.assumptions: SC1-SC8 already applied. Two sessions not yet analyzed: 93456b3b (2608 lines, 15:15 UTC) and efe53299 (920 lines, 13:24 UTC).
before.risk: Duplicate risk if lessons overlap with SC1-SC8 — handled by explicit comparison.

actions.context: 3 new findings (F1-F3 → SC9-SC11). 5 findings dropped as duplicates or too specific.
Added SC9, SC10, SC11 bullets to Coder discipline section.

after.health: SC9-SC11 applied to coder MEMORY.md. Retro MEMORY.md updated.
